message:
bd-ml2r.6.1: add FNX witness metadata to CLI JSON output

Add FnxWitness struct with witness metadata for FNX-assisted rendering:
- enabled: whether FNX integration is available
- used: whether FNX analysis was actually used
- projection_mode: graph projection used (undirected)
- algorithms_invoked: list of FNX algorithms called
- analysis_time_us: time spent in FNX analysis
- budget_exceeded: whether analysis hit budget limits
- fallback_level/reason: degradation status codes
- results_hash: determinism verification hash

The witness is added as an optional field (skip_serializing_if = None)
to maintain backwards compatibility with existing consumers.

Also fixes clippy warnings:
- Collapse nested if in has_node_definition_pattern
- Allow unused centrality param in non-fnx builds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
